LAW AND MOTION 301, JAN-09-2026 RE: PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE UNOPPOSED PETITION FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS IS GRANTED BASED ON THE SUPPLEMENTAL INFORMATION THAT WAS RECEIVED AND THE NEW OFFER THAT WAS TRANSMITTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND PROVIDE A PAPER COPY OF THE PROPOSED ORDER TO DEPT. 301 WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed petition for transfer of payment rights is granted based on the supplemental information that was received and the new offer that was transmitted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and provide a paper copy of the proposed order to Dept. 301 which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Dec-18-2025 Continued To Jan-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Kim Pomerantz, Esq., 310-489-5886 kpomerantz@weappear.com Specially Appearing for Petitioner
J.G. Wentworth Originations, LLC
Malayasia Wallace (payee/tranferor)

Heaering held. Discussed, not ARGUED. Court rules as follows:

PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS LLC'S Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights is continued for further hearing to January 9, 2026. Court orders that supplemental pleadings, as discussed in today's hearing, are due by January 5, 2026.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Continued To Dec-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS LLC's Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Continued on the court's motion to December 18, 2025, to permit consideration of new material provided in support of the petition as errata and supplemental evidence.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
